name: alew3-skills
description: alew3 skills — a marketplace of modular AI skill plugins for Claude Code. Each plugin bundles independently-callable skills plus an optional orchestrator.

plugins.name: higgsfield-seedance-video-suite
plugins.description: Full AI video + image workflow: briefing, image/character/prop/environment generation, character/prop/environment design sheets, style board, storyboard, Seedance 2 / Higgsfield video prompts, audio, passthrough validation, and final handoff. Drives the Higgsfield MCP or emits paste-ready prompts.
